title: ceratostylis glabriflora
intro: Ceratostylis glabriflora, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Ceratostylis glabriflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
